narrative:
Reynoldsburg 3-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,561 registered voters, with 59.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 8.6 percentage points.
